sections.paragraph:
verb לקשות

to harden, solidify, be hard; be difficult

verb לנקוש

to knock, strike, beat; ensnare, snare

verb להתקשות

to harden, toughen; find difficult, have difficulties; be cruel

verb להקיש

to knock, beat, drum; type (on keyboard); infer, analogize; compare

verb להקשות

to make difficult; harden, stiffen, make hard; ask difficult questions; be stubborn

verb הוקש

be beaten, drummed; typed (on keyboard); be inferred, analogized; compared

verb הוקשה

be made difficult; be difficult; be hardened, stiffened

masculine noun

straw, chaff, mulch
